name: keyboard-switcher
title: Keyboard Switcher
description: Manage keyboard layouts via keyboardSwitcher CLI
author: bogdan

commands.name: list-all
commands.title: List All Keyboard Layouts
commands.description: Show all available keyboard layouts, enable/disable/select them

commands.name: quick-switch
commands.title: Quick Switch Layout
commands.subtitle: Keyboard Switcher
commands.description: Switch to a keyboard layout via Quicklink. Create quicklinks from List All Keyboard Layouts.

commands.name: switch-layout-1
commands.title: Switch to Layout 1
commands.subtitle: Keyboard Switcher
commands.description: Instantly switch to a preconfigured keyboard layout. Assign a layout via List All Keyboard Layouts.
